meaning: n.棚屋(用树皮或草编成的席子等搭建的茅屋壮),小屋
examples: Families offer homestays, while shepherds in remote mountain pastures put up guests in yurts – a sort of wigwam b&b on the Silk Road.
Over the top, he managed to draw together two or three bushes, and the improvised wigwam was complete.
In the summer, bull trout forge 50 miles upstream from Lake Koocanusa to spawn in the Wigwam River drainage in British Columbia.
And seeing the Wigwam boarded up is going to rip out a part of that soul.
Among the leaders of the pack were Wigwam, led by Irish singer and keyboard player Jim Pembroke.
